MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FACTORS CORP. OF TEXAS' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS Granted. No opposition filed. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To Apr-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN FACTORS CORP. OF TEXAS' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is continued to April 18, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 19, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). *The Courtroom clerk receives a courtesy copy of moving papers and proposed order* Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
